title: boechera pulchra
intro: Boechera pulchra, also known as the delicate alpine cress or sky cress, is a perennial plant native to the western United States and Canada. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Boechera pulchra include reducing pain and inflammation, treating wounds and skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. Boechera pulchra can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, or tinctures, making it a versatile plant for various health remedies.
